modules.name: Base64
modules.description: Launchpad Mini MkII connection hub. Attach page modules to the right.

modules.name: Buttons64
modules.description: 64 toggle or momentary buttons mapped to the Launchpad grid. 4 × 16-channel polyphonic gate outputs.

modules.name: Grid64
modules.description: 64 toggle or momentary buttons mapped to the Launchpad grid. 64 individual mono gate outputs.

modules.name: Sliders64
modules.description: 8 slewed CV sliders mapped to Launchpad columns. Scene buttons select slew rate. 8 mono CV outputs.

modules.name: Flin64
modules.description: Polyrhythm ray machine. 8 independent cyclic trigger voices with variable speed and length. 8 mono + 1 poly gate outputs.

modules.name: Step64
modules.description: Classic 8-step sequencer. 7 gate rows with toggle steps, variable active length, flashing step indicator. 7 mono + 1 poly gate outputs, step CV.

modules.name: Cafe64
modules.description: Polyrhythm performance sequencer inspired by Press Cafe. 8 rhythm patterns, 8 independent voices, 3 sub-pages: play, rhythm editor, length editor. 8 mono + 1 poly trigger outputs.

modules.name: Gome64
modules.description: 2D pattern arpeggiator inspired by monome gome. Press a grid cell as the root; a pattern of relative offsets walks across the grid each clock tick. 8 selectable patterns, record mode, loop/latch. 4 × 16-channel polyphonic cell-gate outputs.
